title: Article Fields

fields.label: Legacy Content TH
fields.name: content_th
fields.instructions: Legacy fallback only. Prefer Content Blocks for all new articles.

fields.label: Legacy Content EN
fields.name: content_en
fields.instructions: Legacy fallback only. Prefer Content Blocks for all new articles.

fields.label: Content Model Note
fields.message: Use Flexible Content blocks for new articles. Keep legacy Content TH/EN only for older posts or temporary migration fallback.

fields.label: Content Blocks
fields.name: content_blocks
fields.instructions: Primary article body for new content. Compose the page with structured blocks instead of inline HTML or CSS.

sub_fields.label: Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: anchor_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Use lowercase-with-dashes for in-page links.

sub_fields.label: Body TH
sub_fields.name: body_th
sub_fields.instructions: Semantic formatting only. No inline CSS.

sub_fields.label: Body EN
sub_fields.name: body_en
sub_fields.instructions: Semantic formatting only. No inline CSS.

fields.label: Published At
fields.name: published_at
fields.instructions: Optional override if editorial publish date should differ from WordPress post date.

fields.label: Updated At
fields.name: updated_at
fields.instructions: Optional editorial updated date for schema and on-page display.

description: Extends the current bilingual article model with flexible content blocks, taxonomy, editorial dates, FAQ, localized focus keywords, OG, and robots fields.
